name: Tortilla Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 1 cup light Mexican blend cheese, shredded
1 tablespoon Mrs. Dash Onion & Herb seasoning
seasoned salt and garlic powder to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients except the tortillas.
2. Spread the mixture evenly over each tortilla.
3. Roll the tortillas into tubes and cover with plastic wrap.
4. Refrigerate for several hours.
5. Unwrap the tubes, cut into 1-inch slices, discarding the ends.
6. Serve with salsa and/or sour cream and/or guacamole.
